title: Bug: Login page crashes on mobile Chrome
body: When I try to login using my Android phone on Chrome, the page just goes white and crashes. Please fix ASAP.
author: user123

title: Feature Request: Add dark mode
body: It would be great if the dashboard had a dark mode option. My eyes hurt.
author: devdesigner

title: Login not working on mobile
body: Hi, I can't login from my mobile device (Chrome). Just a blank screen.
author: tester_x

title: Payment gateway timeout
body: Sometimes when a user pays, the Stripe gateway times out and the user gets charged but we don't update the DB. We need a webhook handler.
author: finance_lead
